question: Which active inventory products were created after October 2024, ordered by their sort order?
sql: SELECT id, name, code, description, sort_order, created_at FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_products` WHERE is_active = true AND created_at >= '2024-10-01' ORDER BY sort_order ASC

question: What are the details of active inventory write-offs, including the associated product name and currency, for write-offs with an amount greater than 10000?
sql: SELECT wo.id, wo.reference_number, wo.event_date, wo.status, wo.amount, wo.currency, p.name AS product_name, p.code AS product_code FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_inventory_write_offs` wo JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_products` p ON wo.products_id = p.id WHERE wo.status = 'active' AND wo.amount > 10000 ORDER BY wo.amount DESC

question: For each product, what is the total write-off amount, average write-off amount, and number of write-off events, ordered by total write-off amount descending?
sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, p.code AS product_code, COUNT(wo.id) AS write_off_count, SUM(wo.amount) AS total_write_off_amount, AVG(wo.amount) AS avg_write_off_amount FROM `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_inventory_write_offs` wo JOIN `dense-schema-example`.`dense_500`.`inv_products` p ON wo.products_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.code HAVING COUNT(wo.id) > 0 ORDER BY total_write_off_amount DESC
